name: stellarskills
description: The missing knowledge between AI agents and production Stellar Network applications.

skills.name: stellar-expert
skills.description: Provides expert knowledge and rules for building applications on the Stellar Network using the stellarskills CLI.

skills.name: stellarskills
skills.description: The missing knowledge between AI agents and production Stellar Network applications.

skills.name: stellarskills-accounts
skills.description: Keypairs, account creation, signers, multisig, minimum balance, sponsorship, muxed accounts.

skills.name: stellarskills-anchors
skills.description: Fiat on/off-ramps on Stellar. Integration flows, stellar.toml, and the anchor ecosystem.

skills.name: stellarskills-assets
skills.description: Custom asset issuance, trustlines, asset types, Stellar Asset Contract (SAC), USDC and stablecoins.

skills.name: stellarskills-dex
skills.description: Stellar's built-in order book, Automated Market Makers (AMM), Liquidity Pools, and Path Payments.

skills.name: stellarskills-fees
skills.description: Stellar transaction fees, base fee, surge pricing, resource fees (Soroban), and fee bumps.

skills.name: stellarskills-frontend
skills.description: Connecting web apps to Stellar. Stellar Wallets Kit, Freighter API, signing Soroban transactions, and secure SEP-10 Web3 Auth.

skills.name: stellarskills-horizon
skills.description: Stellar's REST API for accounts, transactions, operations, effects, order books, streaming. Not for Soroban — see /rpc/SKILL.md for smart contracts.

skills.name: stellarskills-local-node
skills.description: How to run a local Stellar blockchain, RPC, and Friendbot. The Stellar equivalent of Hardhat Node or Anvil.

skills.name: stellarskills-openzeppelin
skills.description: OpenZeppelin's audited smart contracts, Contract Wizard, and developer toolings for Stellar's Soroban (Rust) environment.

skills.name: stellarskills-operations
skills.description: Reference for all Stellar transaction operations. Payments, account management, offers, trustlines.

skills.name: stellarskills-rpc
skills.description: Soroban's JSON-RPC API for smart contracts. Simulation, invocation, fetching ledger state, and getting events.

skills.name: stellarskills-security
skills.description: Critical security patterns, common vulnerabilities, and best practices for writing Soroban smart contracts in Rust.

skills.name: stellarskills-seps
skills.description: SEP-1 (stellar.toml), SEP-6, SEP-10 (auth), SEP-12 (KYC), SEP-24, SEP-31, SEP-38 — the interoperability standards that power Stellar's payment rails.

skills.name: stellarskills-soroban
skills.description: Stellar's smart contract platform. Rust/WASM contracts, storage types, auth, invocation, resource limits.

skills.name: stellarskills-storage
skills.description: How to manage state in Soroban. Understanding Persistent, Temporary, and Instance storage, TTL/Rent, and migrating from Solidity mappings.

skills.name: stellarskills-testing
skills.description: How to test Soroban smart contracts using Rust's built-in testing framework and the Stellar CLI.

skills.name: stellarskills-tools
skills.description: The essential tools, SDKs, wallets, and explorers for building on Stellar.

skills.name: stellarskills-why
skills.description: A sober, honest assessment of what Stellar is for, its tradeoffs, and why you would choose it over EVM or Solana.

skills.name: stellarskills-x402
skills.description: Pay-per-API calls for AI Agents on Stellar. Monetize endpoints natively without subscriptions or credit cards using HTTP 402.

skills.name: stellarskills-ingest-sdk
skills.description: Building network data ingestion pipelines on Stellar. Reading the ledger, mapping to custom models, and outputting to datastores or message brokers using go-stellar-sdk.

skills.name: stellarskills-zk-proofs
skills.description: Zero-Knowledge proofs on Stellar, including BN254 host functions, Poseidon hashing, and Privacy Pools.

skills.name: stellarskills-mpp
skills.description: Machine Payments Protocol on Stellar. HTTP 402 charge and session intents for AI agents using Soroban token transfers without external facilitator.

skills.name: stellarskills-passkeys
skills.description: Passkeys (WebAuthn) and smart wallets on Stellar. secp256r1 signatures, __check_auth authorization, and Launchtube relay for gasless flows.

skills.name: stellarskills-state-archival
skills.description: Soroban state archival and TTL management. Storage expiration, restoration paths, and operational patterns for contract state on Stellar.
